governingBody: Government of India or British Indian authorities
reasonSummary: This book is alleged to hurt Muslim sentiments. This book cannot be imported into India. The original German title was Aischa: Mohammed's Lieblingfrau (Aischa: Mohammed's Favorite Wife).
